meta.description: Public-safe DNA corroboration summaries (no kit IDs, no raw segment tables).

summaries.title: Possible Shapiro cross-tree DNA corroboration
summaries.text: Autosomal DNA evidence supports a paternal-side connection involving a match recorded as Meir Shapiro, with a corresponding appearance in Yael's records as Seth Shapiro. This may support an Alperovich paternal-branch hypothesis, subject to further corroboration.

summaries.title: Shared Alperovich branch with Gordon (MyHeritage) family site
summaries.text: A documented shared branch runs through Yehuda Alperovich (~1850–1917): Michael Alperovich (Yael's line) and Talba Beila Alperovich Gordon (Gordon site line) are siblings. Descendants Yael Livnat and Michel Gordon are third cousins (shared great-great-grandparent).

summaries.title: Oded Livnat-Tal — Y-DNA on direct paternal (Lanzmann) line
summaries.text: Y-DNA from kit work attributed to Oded is summarized at haplogroup R-M269 on the direct paternal line, in Lanzmann-branch context. R-M269 is a broad R1b branch common in Western Europe; finer genealogical resolution would come from more downstream SNPs if and when reported.
